title: inula turolensis
intro: Inula turolensis, also known as Torenia or Spanish toadflax, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Inula turolensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw or used in infusions, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual usage.
